titleStmt.title: SII 6.1065: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1065. (A.R. No. 332-LV of 1899). IN THE FORTY-SECOND NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē nāgabhūtriśasiparimitē śuklapakṣē tritīyāyīṁ
vaiśākhē kujāhē harigiripadāyē pratiAhaṁ bhaccalāṁbbā svē
ṣṭā[Āptye] ratnabhāsvat śubhasamayaAlaṁbhūṣaṇaṁ svāṁtadhā¨ryyaṁ . dīpaṁ cākhaṁ
ḍamēkaṁ pratikṛtisaihitaṁ gāśca paṁcāsat dādāt . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1318 gunē
ṁṭi vaiśākha śukla tritīyā maṁgaḷavāramunāṁḍu naṁdapuraṁ bhaiyyarāju
kūṁtuṟu bhaccaladēvijīyyama tanaku Abhīṣṭā¨rttasidhigānu śrīnarasiṁ
hyanāthuniki nityamunnu cātanu Oka ratnamauttikabhāsitamaina padakaṁ Okaṭi
sānidhiAṁdu veluṁganu Oka Akhaṁḍadīpamunnu pratimasaihitaṁgānu sama¨rppi
ṁpenu I dīpana vattikini śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdunu gaṁḍamāḍa Okaṭi peṭenu . I
ṁdula samarukunai Ēṁbai mōdālu 50 bai kilāri śrīramapaḍḍirayanivaśananu peṭi
ri Itani kuḍujītānaku polamu mūṁḍu puṭlu peṭiri Itaṁḍu I polamu bhōga
mu cēsi śrībhaṁḍārānaku peṭi nelaku padi kuṁcāla Aḍḍa 10 . lekhanu Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
stāyigānu pōyaṁgalaṁḍu I dha¨rmmamu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1065 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
